zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Fiske於1561年出生在英國素福爾可丹寧頓時，她的父親Nicholas Fiske47歲，母親Joan Crispe34歲。她於1586年10月16日與Anthony Fisher在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1640年4月19日在英國素福爾可希勒哈姆享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Fiske于1561年出生在英国素福爾可丹寧頓时，她的父亲Nicholas Fiske47岁，母亲Joan Crispe34岁。她于1586年10月16日与Anthony Fisher在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1640年4月19日在英国素福爾可希勒哈姆享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Fiske was born in 1561, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, her father, Nicholas Fiske, was 47 and her mother, Joan Crispe, was 34. She married Anthony Fisher on 16 October 1586, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 19 April 1640, in Syleham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Fiske est née en 1561, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Fiske, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Joan Crispe, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Anthony Fisher le 16 octobre 1586, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1640, à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Fiske 1561 in Dennington, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Fiske 47 und ihre Mutter Joan Crispe 34. Sie hat am 16. Oktober 1586 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Anthony Fisher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. April 1640 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Syleham, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Fiske è nata il nel 1561 nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Nicholas Fiske, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Joan Crispe, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Anthony Fisher il 16 ottobre 1586, nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1640, nel Syleham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Fiskeが1561年にイギリススフォルクデニントンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Fiskeは47歳，母Joan Crispeは34歳であった。1586年10月16日にイギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドでAnthony Fisherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1640年4月19日にイギリススフォルクシレハムで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Fiske(이)가 1561년 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Fiske(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Crispe(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1586년 10월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에서 Anthony Fisher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1640년 4월 19일 영국 수폴크 실함에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Fiske nasceu em 1561, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Fiske, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Joan Crispe, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Anthony Fisher em 16 de outubro de 1586, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de abril de 1640, em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Fiske родилась в 1561 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Fiske было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Crispe, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anthony Fisher 16 октября 1586 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 19 апреля 1640 г. в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Fiske nació en 1561, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Fiske, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Joan Crispe, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Anthony Fisher el 16 de octubre de 1586, en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de abril de 1640, en Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
